errors.invoke_err_desc: Something went wrong while running that command.

help.overview_desc: Here's a list of all available commands. Type `<>help <command>` for more details.

music.already_in_vc: I'm already in a VC and you're not in one.
music.not_in_bot_vc: ❌ You must be in the bot's voice channel to use these controls.
music.inactivity_leave: Nothing was played in the last 2 minutes. Leaving.
music.queue_full: Queue is full (**{max}** tracks max). Remove or clear some tracks first.
music.dup_prompt:
⚠️ **{query}** is already {status}.
Do you want to add it again?
music.dup_only_author_confirm: Only the person who queued this can confirm.
music.dup_only_author_cancel: Only the person who queued this can cancel.
music.queue_empty: The queue is empty and nothing is playing.
music.shuffle_fail: Not enough tracks in the queue to shuffle.
music.remove_fail: Invalid position. The queue has {len} tracks.

admin.channel_set: ✅ Music commands are now locked to {channel}.
admin.channel_cleared: 🔓 Music commands can now be used in any channel.
admin.dj_set: 🎧 DJ role set to {role}. Only users with this role can use destructive commands.
admin.dj_cleared: 🔓 DJ role requirement removed. Anyone can use destructive commands.
admin.not_admin: ❌ You need Administrator permissions to use this command.
admin.wrong_channel: ❌ Please use the {channel} channel for music commands.
admin.not_dj_role: ❌ You need the **{role}** role to use this command.
